positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for beethoven_composer_positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,negated_conjecture,
    ~is(beethoven,composer)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    is(beethoven,conductor)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    is(vienna_music_society,orchestra)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    is(symphony_no_9,music_piece)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~leads(X1,X0) | is(X1,conductor) | ~is(X0,orchestra)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    leads(beethoven,vienna_music_society)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define writes(X0,X1) := $false
for all inputs,
    define wrote(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define premiered(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
